scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key behaviours: collect_unit_status, collect_app_status (leader only), add_status(), priority order, multiple handlers. Minor omission: doesn't mention that calling add_status() with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus is an error.
scores.hallucination_notes: Priority order listed as 'ErrorStatus > BlockedStatus > WaitingStatus > MaintenanceStatus > ActiveStatus' — the gold standard lists maintenance above waiting (error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active). This is a factual inaccuracy in the ordering. Also states 'If no status is added, the unit stays ActiveStatus (the default)' which may not be precisely accurate per the gold standard.
